summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: horizontal axes with two shaded media (BLUE left, BLUE_D right) split at x=0 with dashed RED interface. ValueTracker t_tr advances time 0→8; always_redraw YELLOW traveling wave y = cos(k(x)·x - ωt) with k=π (left) / k=2π (right), ω=π so frequency preserved, wavelength halves through the slower medium.
